# Desert Recovery Centers
> Joint Commission accredited luxury behavioral health treatment in Arizona. Specializing in residential treatment, PHP, IOP, and outpatient programs for addiction and mental health.

## About
Desert Recovery Centers operates luxury residential treatment facilities in Glendale and Scottsdale, Arizona, and an outpatient PHP/IOP/TMS center in Phoenix, Arizona. Founded by Thai Nguyen and directed by Dr. An Nguyen (Licensed Clinical Psychologist, Clinical Director) and Dr. Jonathan Shelton. Joint Commission accredited. LegitScript certified.

## Locations
- Glendale (Residential): 8105 W Frier Dr, Glendale AZ 85303, (623) 323-1012
- Scottsdale (Residential): 23222 N Church Rd, Scottsdale AZ 85255, (480) 931-3617
- Phoenix PHP/IOP/TMS: 4160 N. 108th Ave, Phoenix AZ 85037, (623) 257-5384

## Programs
- Residential Treatment (RTC): /treatments/residential
- Partial Hospitalization (PHP): /locations/phoenix-php-iop
- Intensive Outpatient (IOP): /locations/phoenix-php-iop
- Outpatient (OP): /locations/phoenix-php-iop
- TMS Therapy: /locations/phoenix-php-iop
- Adolescent Treatment (Ages 13 to 17): /adolescent-treatment

## Conditions Treated
Mental health: Depression, Anxiety, PTSD, Bipolar Disorder, OCD, ADHD, Schizophrenia, Personality Disorders
Addiction: Alcohol, Opioids, Fentanyl, Cocaine, Methamphetamine, Prescription Drugs, Marijuana

## Adolescent Condition Pages
/adolescent/depression - Residential treatment for adolescent depression in Arizona. Covers how depression presents in teenagers, co-occurring conditions, treatment approach, and what parents can expect.
/adolescent/anxiety - Residential treatment for adolescent anxiety disorders in Arizona including generalized anxiety, panic disorder, social anxiety, and school refusal.
/adolescent/ptsd-trauma - Trauma-informed residential treatment for adolescent PTSD in Arizona. Covers causes, presentations, ACE assessment, and phase-based trauma treatment.
/adolescent/ocd - Specialized residential OCD treatment for adolescents in Arizona using Exposure and Response Prevention therapy. Covers all OCD subtypes including Pure-O.
/adolescent/adhd - Residential treatment for adolescent ADHD with co-occurring conditions in Arizona. Covers dual diagnosis approach, girls with ADHD, and executive function treatment.
/adolescent/bipolar - Residential treatment for adolescent bipolar disorder in Arizona. Covers misdiagnosis risk, hypomania and mixed episode presentations, and mood stabilization treatment.
/adolescent/self-harm - Clinical residential treatment for adolescent self harm in Arizona using Dialectical Behavior Therapy. Covers function of self harm, suicide risk, and family involvement.
/adolescent/substance-use - Dual diagnosis residential treatment for adolescent substance use in Arizona. Covers fentanyl risk, co-occurring mental health conditions, and simultaneous treatment approach.
/adolescent/suicidal-ideation - Adolescent suicide risk assessment, safety planning, and residential treatment in Arizona. Covers ideation spectrum, risk factors, evidence-based safety planning, and parent crisis guidance.

## Key Facts
- Joint Commission Gold Seal of Approval
- LegitScript Certified
- Maximum 10 clients per facility
- Doctoral level clinical psychologists on staff
- Board certified psychiatrist on staff
- 24/7 admissions: (623) 323-1012
- Insurance accepted: Aetna, BCBS, Cigna, UnitedHealthcare, Humana, Tricare
- Most clients begin treatment within 48 hours
